strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java).
Direct, hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly matching the niche job requirement.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, including creating custom test runners, practicing TDD, and teaching testing workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though strong engineering fundamentals suggest he could adapt quickly.
Significant historical focus on DLang and Ember.js, which are not part of the target stack.
Ongoing commitment as a Founder of GISCollective might compete for time or focus, depending on the current level of involvement.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly seasoned software engineer with over 15 years of experience, demonstrating deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and his exceptional background in software craftsmanship and TDD make him an outstanding fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role, easily outweighing the lack of explicit keywords for Nest.js and Vitest.
